introSection: Formule X is a Maurer Rides built sit-down launched roller coaster located at Drievliet Family Park in The Hague, Zuid-Holland, Netherlands. It opened on 6 April 2007.

sections.title: Design
sections.content:
Formule X is the prototype X-Car launched roller coaster from Maurer Rides. Riders are accelerated to the maximum speed of in two seconds. The dive loop follows, where the ride reaches its maximum height of.

Red track and black supports.

fullText:
Formule X is a Maurer Rides built sit-down launched roller coaster located at Drievliet Family Park in The Hague, Zuid-Holland, Netherlands. It opened on 6 April 2007.

Formule X is the prototype X-Car launched roller coaster from Maurer Rides. Riders are accelerated to the maximum speed of in two seconds. The dive loop follows, where the ride reaches its maximum height of.

Red track and black supports.
